Shardul
Kulkarni

Software Engineering Intern · Pune, MH

I’m a Computer Science undergraduate from Pune who’s passionate about coding and building things with technology. I enjoy solving problems through DSA and exploring full-stack development while improving my skills through platforms like LeetCode and GitHub. I’m also pursuing a Data Science Honors program, which has helped me develop an interest in working with data, analytics, and problem solving from a more practical perspective. I like working on projects that help me learn something new and give me hands-on experience.

Apart from tech, I’m a quick learner who enjoys working with people, sharing ideas, and taking up new challenges. I value teamwork, communication, and consistency, and I’m always looking for ways to grow both technically and personally. My goal is to keep improving as a developer and contribute to projects that create real impact.

C++ Developer ✦ React.js ✦ Node.js ✦ Python ✦ MongoDB ✦ AI/ML ✦ DSA 200+ Problems ✦ MERN Stack ✦ Full Stack ✦ ACM Tech Co-Head ✦ C++ Developer ✦ React.js ✦ Node.js ✦ Python ✦ MongoDB ✦ AI/ML ✦ DSA 200+ Problems ✦ MERN Stack ✦ Full Stack ✦ ACM Tech Co-Head ✦
